gap_summaries: [ultrathink] FIXED 🔴 build_cmd error evidence not persisted and audit event not emitted — run_single_collector returned early with persisted_path=None on build_cmd exception, breaking fail-closed semantics (§7). Fixed: persist error evidence and emit audit event before returning CollectorOutcome.

[ultrathink] FIXED 🟡 test_bundle_hash_deterministic computed hash1/hash2 but never asserted equality — duration_ms differences between runs make hashes non-deterministic. Renamed to test_consistent_statuses_across_runs and removed unused hash variables.
[ultrathink] FIXED 🟡 Task 9 test_build_cmd_exception_produces_error asserted persisted_path is None — inconsistent with the critical fix above. Updated to assertIsNotNone + exists().
[ultrathink] FIXED 🟡 Task 7 test_build_cmd_error asserted persisted_path is None — same root cause as critical gap. Updated to assert evidence IS persisted.

[ultrathink] 🟡 file_patterns declared on CollectorConfig but never used in runner or diff-scope logic — dead config field. Intentionally deferred to M5 per-collector diff-scoping; field serves as a schema placeholder.
[ultrathink] 🔵 No test for DiffScope git timeout path — subprocess.TimeoutExpired handler exists but is untested. Low risk since the handler is a single-line re-raise.

[ultrathink] 🔵 tool_version not passed through run_single_collector to run_collector_with_timeout — evidence records will have empty tool_version. Non-critical metadata; doctor already collects versions.

[ultrathink] 🔵 _matches_pattern with path-based patterns containing '/' not tested — only basename and extension patterns are covered. No path-based patterns exist in DEFAULT_FILE_CATEGORY_MAP currently.

[ultrathink] 🔵 Runner does not log or trace skipped collectors (kill-switch or diff-scope filtered) — no observability gap for debugging. Acceptable for framework milestone; add in orchestrator wiring (M10).

[ultrathink] 🔵 deterministic field not propagated through normal run path — run_collector_with_timeout always creates deterministic=True evidence via make_evidence_record default. Only the build_cmd error path correctly propagates config.deterministic.

[ultrathink] 🔵 _init_repo and _add_commit test helpers duplicated across test_diff_scope.py, test_collector_runner.py, test_collector_integration.py — acceptable for test isolation, no shared test fixtures needed.
[ultrathink] 🔵 No test for check_collector_available when shutil.which succeeds but version cmd times out — handled by try/except in _get_tool_version but not explicitly tested.

[ultrathink] 🔵 fnmatch import placement not shown in full-file context for Task 5 — plan mentions 'updating imports' but doesn't show the complete import block. Implementer should add it after existing imports.

[ultrathink] DEFERRED 🔵 Sequential collector execution may not meet §18 ≤10 min target for large projects — deliberate simplicity choice for framework milestone. Parallel execution deferred to M10 orchestrator.
